evals.prompt:
네이버 웹툰 백엔드 엔지니어에 지원하려고 해.

[채용 공고]
백엔드 엔지니어
- Java/Kotlin 기반 서버 개발 3년 이상
- Spring Boot, Spring MVC 경험
- RDBMS 설계 및 운영 경험
- 대규모 트래픽 처리 경험 우대
- 웹툰 서비스 도메인 이해도 우대
evals.expected_output: Extracts company (naver-webtoon), date (today YYMMDD), creates branch, invokes review-resume with JD context, follows structured 6-step workflow

assertions.description: Company name correctly extracted in lowercase kebab-case
Branch follows {company}/{YYMMDD} pattern
References S1-S5 or D1-D6 evaluation dimensions
Notes correct bun run pdf {branch} command
Produces correct final PDF path with variable substitution
Follows all 6 steps in documented order
Handles config file check, interview, and YAML creation
Does not fabricate experience or metrics

evals.prompt:
라인망가에 지원 준비 해야돼. JD는 이거야:

Line Manga - Server Engineer
주요업무:
- Kotlin/Java 기반 서버 개발
- 만화 뷰어 및 스토어 API 개발
- 결제/정산 시스템 운영
자격요건:
- 서버 개발 경력 5년 이상
- Kotlin 또는 Java 능숙
- Spring Framework 활용 경험
evals.expected_output: Extracts company (linemanga), date (today YYMMDD), creates branch, invokes review-resume with JD context, follows structured 6-step workflow

assertions.description: Company name correctly extracted in lowercase kebab-case
Branch follows {company}/{YYMMDD} pattern
References S1-S5 or D1-D6 evaluation dimensions
Notes correct bun run pdf {branch} command
Produces correct final PDF path with variable substitution
Follows all 6 steps in documented order
Handles config file check, interview, and YAML creation
Does not fabricate experience or metrics

evals.prompt:
쿠팡 백엔드 엔지니어에 지원하려고 해.

[채용 공고]
Backend Engineer
주요업무:
- Java/Kotlin 기반 대규모 이커머스 서버 개발
- 주문/결제/물류 시스템 설계 및 운영
- MSA 기반 서비스 개발
자격요건:
- 서버 개발 경력 3년 이상
- Spring Boot, JPA 활용 경험
- Redis, Kafka 경험 우대
evals.expected_output: Extracts company (coupang), date (today YYMMDD), creates branch, checks other branches for reference patterns, invokes review-resume with JD context, resolves pdf_output_dir_rule, extracts {position} from JD title

assertions.description: Company name correctly extracted as 'coupang' in lowercase
Branch follows {company}/{YYMMDD} pattern
Checks other branches' _config.yml for existing patterns before review-resume
References S1-S5 or D1-D6 evaluation dimensions
Extracts position title from JD (Backend Engineer) for {position} variable
Resolves pdf_output_dir_rule by interpreting natural language rule, not using hardcoded path
Follows all 6 steps in documented order
Does not fabricate experience or metrics
